meaning: n.发散,发光,发热,辐射,放射,放射线,放射物
examples: The sun's radiation penetrates the skin.
Ozone is the earth's barrier against ultra-violet radiation.
Their cancers are not so clearly tied to radiation exposure.
Ionizing radiation can bring this about by breaking chemical bonds in atoms and molecules.
In one study, 637 patients received standard chemotherapy plus radiation, and half also received Avastin.
